name: Spain

authority.name: FNMT-RCM — Fábrica Nacional de Moneda y Timbre (Ceres)

source.note: Coverage sourced from the Spanish national Trusted List (Lista de Servicios de Confianza), LOTL-verified via XAdES signature chain from the EU List of Trusted Lists. Signer: MINISTRY OF ECONOMIC AFFAIRS AND DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION / SPANISH TRUST SCHEME OPERATOR.

notes: FNMT-RCM is Spain's public-sector qualified trust service provider under eIDAS. The AC RAIZ FNMT-RCM carries its name in the OU field (no CN), which is why the directory reads it from OU. RSA throughout.
